covered.translate: крытый, покрытый, закрытый, прикрытый, охваченный, укрытый, защищенный, в шляпе

examples.eng: Water covered the floor.
We covered three states in two days.
examples.ru: Мы проехали три штата за два дня.

examples.eng: Are we covered for theft?
His skin was covered in spots.
Thick woods covered their retreat.
The gardener covered the soil with mulch.
examples.ru: Садовник покрыл почву мульчей. / Садовод мульчировал почву.

examples.eng: He stands always covered, even in the presence of the king.
examples.ru: Он никогда не обнажает голову, даже в присутствии короля.

examples.eng: an old pump covered in rust
She covered herself with glory.
Her boots were covered with mud.
The floor was covered with dust.
The boy's body is covered in boils.
The grass covered the grave.
Her body was covered in bite marks.
Smith covered again.
examples.ru: Смит вновь покрыл карту партнёра. (cover — play a higher card than the one previously played — vocabulary.com)

examples.eng: Moss covered the fallen logs.
Grey mould covered the walls.
Spongy moss covered the ground.
The grass was covered with frost.
Hedgehogs are covered with spines.
She covered her head with a scarf.
His chin was covered with bristles.
A film of ice covered the sidewalk.
examples.ru: Тротуар был покрыт тонким слоем льда.

examples.eng: Her sweater was covered with fluff.
examples.ru: Её свитер был весь в катышках /в пуху/.

examples.eng: She covered her face with her hands.
A blanket of fog covered the fields.
His arm was covered with bee stings.
examples.ru: Его рука была покрыта следами пчелиных укусов.

examples.eng: Dan covered his face with his hands.
A slimy substance covered the rocks.
examples.ru: Камни были покрыты какой-то склизкой субстанцией.

examples.eng: He covered for me during my vacation.
examples.ru: Он заменял меня, пока я был в отпуске.
